image:image.image:title: Shata Dhauta Ghirta (100-Times Washed Ghee Cream)
image:image.image:caption: Himalayan Shata Dhauta Ghirta prepared in pure copper vessels, washed 10,000 times with water and rose water.

image:image.image:title: Himalayan Hemp Anti-Acne Soap
image:image.image:caption: Handcrafted cold-processed anti-acne soap formulated with high-altitude botanicals.

image:image.image:title: Himalayan Body Butter 150g - Front View
image:image.image:caption: Premium body butter made from wild forest Chuiri butter and high-altitude Yak ghee.

image:image.image:title: Himalayan Body Butter 150g - Texture View
image:image.image:caption: Rich, creamy texture of our deep conditioning body butter.

image:image.image:title: Himalayan Body Butter 45g - Travel Size
image:image.image:caption: Travel-friendly 45g jar of our organic Chuiri and Yak ghee body butter.

image:image.image:title: Himalayan Body Butter 45g - Ingredients
image:image.image:caption: Clean, organic skin nourishment grown with care and honesty in Nepal.

image:image.image:title: Himalayan Body Butter 45g - Packaging
image:image.image:caption: Eco-friendly glass jar packaging of Kenne's Himalayan Body Butter.

image:image.image:title: Artisan Coffee Coldprocessed Soap
image:image.image:caption: Handcrafted exfoliating coffee soap made with organic Nepali coffee beans.

image:image.image:title: Artisan Kapur (Camphor) Coldprocessed Soap
image:image.image:caption: Cooling, purifying soap containing pure Kapur leaf extract and oils.

image:image.image:title: Artisan Multani Mitti (Fuller's Earth) Coldprocessed Soap
image:image.image:caption: Clay soap to draw out impurities, absorb oil, and refine pores.

image:image.image:title: Artisan Neem Coldprocessed Soap
image:image.image:caption: Purifying Neem soap made with cold-pressed neem seed oil for clear skin.

image:image.image:title: Artisan Turmeric Coldprocessed Soap
image:image.image:caption: Anti-inflammatory soap with wild turmeric powder to brighten skin tone.

image:image.image:title: Himalayan Crack Care Balm
image:image.image:caption: Soothing heel and skin repair balm with high-altitude Yak Ghee.

image:image.image:title: Hemp Glow Face Oil
image:image.image:caption: Nourishing facial oil with high-altitude hemp seed oil and active botanical extracts.

image:image.image:title: Himalayan Hair Massage Oil
image:image.image:caption: Revitalizing oil infusion for hair and scalp massage using ancient herbal recipes.

image:image.image:title: Yak Ghee Healing Lip Balm - Front
image:image.image:caption: Healing lip balm formulated with high-altitude Yak ghee and organic hemp oil.

image:image.image:title: Yak Ghee Healing Lip Balm - Open Jar
image:image.image:caption: Natural and chemical-free texture of our signature lip balm.

image:image.image:title: Yak Ghee Healing Lip Balm - Swatch
image:image.image:caption: Creamy, protective application of natural Yak ghee lip care.

image:image.image:title: Yak Ghee Healing Lip Balm - Lifestyle
image:image.image:caption: Pure mountain skincare built for dry, chapped lips.

image:image.image:title: Hemp Lip Butter
image:image.image:caption: Deep hydration lip care featuring organic hemp seed oil and beeswax.

image:image.image:title: Chuiri Tinted Lip Elixir
image:image.image:caption: Naturally pigmented lip elixir using wild forest Chuiri butter.

image:image.image:title: Hemp Lip Butter - Application
image:image.image:caption: Smooth, non-greasy protective moisture layer for daily lip care.

image:image.image:title: Hemp Lip Butter - Packaging
image:image.image:caption: Premium glass pots containing hand-poured herbal lip treatments.

image:image.image:title: Himalayan Lip Repair Lip Balm
image:image.image:caption: Intense repair balm for severely dry lips, powered by Himalayan ghee.

image:image.image:title: Himalayan Tattoo Care Balm
image:image.image:caption: Artisan tattoo care balm that keeps ink vibrant and heals new tattoos.
